next_steps: Monitor blood pressure and titrate antihypertensive therapy to target, avoiding rapid drops
Perform lumbar puncture to rule out infectious etiologies and evaluate opening pressure
Review and adjust chronic immunosuppressive or medication regimen as potential triggers
Obtain continuous electroencephalogram (EEG) to monitor for subclinical seizure activity
Maintain adequate hydration and oxygenation to prevent further sickle cell vaso-occlusion
Optimize seizure management with appropriate antiepileptic therapy
